title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Atul Projects - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Atul Projects - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
